goals: ✅ Steady Sugar Management (रक्त शर्करा/शुगर नियंत्रण): Target < 150 mg/dL (Optimized Medication (सही दवाएं))
🚭 Smoking Cessation (धूम्रपान छोड़ना): #1 priority because chain smoking worsens sugar, heart risk, fatty liver risk, lungs, and cancer risk
✅ Oxidative Stress (ऑक्सीडेटिव स्ट्रेस/अंदरूनी टूट-फूट) Management: Support the body while quitting tobacco
✅ Gentle Weight Management (वजन नियंत्रण): Target about -2 to -3 kg/month; avoid rapid loss, skipped meals, or crash dieting while insulin/Daparyl M are active
✅ Cooling Summer Hydration (पानी की कमी पूरी करना) (गर्मी से बचाव और हाइड्रेशन) (Chaach, Jeera Water, Lauki/Tori)
✅ Balanced Nutrition (संतुलित आहार): Focus on Whole Grains & Fresh Greens
✅ Healthy Fats (स्वस्थ वसा/चिकनाई): Controlled usage (Max 3 tsp / 15ml Oil per day)
🛡️ Pancreas + Liver Support (अग्नाशय और लिवर का सहारा): Anti-inflammatory (सूजन कम करने वाला) + Antioxidant (नुकसान से बचाने वाले तत्व) foods
🛡️ Cancer-Risk Reduction (कैंसर का खतरा कम करना): tobacco-free life + vegetables + fiber + doctor follow-up

conditionSummary.title: Diabetes is the root issue
conditionSummary.explain: HbA1c 12.7% means sugar has been high for about 3 months. Fasting sugar improved from 275.7 to 184 mg/dL, but it is still above target.
conditionSummary.hindi: मतलब: शुगर कम हो रही है, पर अभी भी किडनी, आंख, दिल और लिवर की सुरक्षा के लिए सख्त नियंत्रण चाहिए।

conditionSummary.title: Grade-2 Fatty Liver
conditionSummary.explain: USG shows liver span 19 cm and moderate fat in the liver. This is usually reversible with sugar control, weight loss, walking, and zero alcohol.
conditionSummary.hindi: मतलब: लिवर में चर्बी जमा है, लेकिन अभी मेहनत से वापस सुधर सकता है।

conditionSummary.title: Heart risk is high
conditionSummary.explain: LDL 181.7, triglycerides 238, diabetes, BP history, and chain smoking together make heart protection very important.
conditionSummary.hindi: मतलब: धूम्रपान + शुगर + कोलेस्ट्रॉल मिलकर हार्ट अटैक/स्ट्रोक का खतरा बढ़ाते हैं।

conditionSummary.title: Mild prostate enlargement
conditionSummary.explain: Prostate volume 27 cc is mild Grade-1 enlargement. It mainly needs monitoring unless urinary symptoms appear.
conditionSummary.hindi: मतलब: अभी घबराने वाली बात नहीं, लेकिन रात में बार-बार पेशाब, जलन, कमजोर धार हो तो डॉक्टर को बताएं।

safetyFirst.title: Daparyl M sick-day alert
safetyFirst.text: Because Daparyl M contains dapagliflozin (SGLT2 inhibitor), abdominal pain with nausea/vomiting, unusual tiredness, breathing trouble, fever, poor intake, or dehydration needs urgent doctor advice. Ketoacidosis can rarely happen even when sugar is not very high.
safetyFirst.hindi: पेट दर्द + उल्टी/बहुत कमजोरी/सांस फूलना/बुखार/कम खाना हो तो सिर्फ गैस न मानें; ketone/doctor check जरूरी हो सकता है।

safetyFirst.title: Low sugar watch
safetyFirst.text: Insulin plus Daparyl M already lowers sugar. Do not add karela juice, giloy, kutki, ashwagandha, high-dose cinnamon, or turmeric/curcumin supplements without doctor approval and glucose monitoring.
safetyFirst.hindi: जड़ी-बूटी/काढ़ा/सप्लीमेंट को दवा जैसा मानें। शुगर कम होने का खतरा हो सकता है।

safetyFirst.title: Pancreatitis/EPI rule
safetyFirst.text: Keep meals small, low-oil, and regular. Take Panlipase/PERT exactly as prescribed with meals/snacks. Avoid alcohol completely and keep working on smoking cessation because both worsen pancreas risk.
safetyFirst.hindi: भारी, तला हुआ खाना नहीं; Panlipase खाने के साथ ही लें; शराब बिल्कुल नहीं।

avoidFoods.allopathy: Nicotine (तंबाकू का नशे वाला रसायन) raises blood sugar, worsens insulin resistance (इंसुलिन का काम न कर पाना), damages blood vessels, and greatly raises heart/lung/cancer risk.
avoidFoods.ayurveda: Vata-Pitta aggravation, Ojas depletion, and Ama (विषाक्त पदार्थ/गंदगी) formation. सबसे बड़ा उपचार: धीरे-धीरे नहीं, डॉक्टर/quitline की मदद से पक्का छोड़ना।

avoidFoods.allopathy: Directly toxic to liver — accelerates fatty liver (फैटी लिवर/लिवर में सूजन) → fibrosis (लिवर का सख्त होना)
Spikes blood sugar (ब्लड शुगर/रक्त शर्करा), promotes liver fat deposition
Feeds liver fat + uncontrolled diabetes (fructose → liver fat)
Saturated/trans fats → direct liver fat accumulation
High fructose content → directly converted to liver fat
High sodium → hypertension (हाई बीपी). Oil → liver fat

schedule.label: Wake-up (Cooling Start)
schedule.food: Methi Dana Water (soaked overnight) OR Jeera Pani. (Helps maintain steady morning levels and keeps the body cool)

schedule.label: ✨ Optional Protective Drink
schedule.food: Haldi + Kali Mirch Warm Water (¼ tsp haldi + tiny pinch kali mirch + nimbu). Simple meaning: food-level turmeric water. Use once daily only if it suits his stomach; the second dose can simply be haldi/kali mirch used in dal or sabzi. Avoid turmeric/curcumin capsules unless doctor approves.

schedule.label: ✨ Immunity (रोग प्रतिरोधक क्षमता) Shield
schedule.food: Amla Water (Tue/Thu/Sun) OR skip. Giloy Water only if doctor agrees. (Amla: Vitamin C (विटामिन सी) + antioxidants. Giloy can lower sugar and may interact with diabetes medicines, so do not self-start.)

schedule.label: Breakfast (Light & Protein)
schedule.food: 2 Moong Dal Chillas (add grated adrak + haldi to batter) + Hari Chutney + Chaach. Add lahsun in cooking if tolerated. (Take Panlipase 10000 with first bite. Allicin (लहसुन का रक्षक तत्व) forms best when crushed garlic rests 5-10 min.)

schedule.label: ✨ Seasonal Fruits
schedule.food: Choose 1 fruit only: Papaya small bowl OR 1 small apple OR 1 guava OR small bowl anar. Jamun only when in season (8-10 pieces). + 1 glass Chaach if tolerated. No fruit juice, no jamun seed powder without doctor approval.

schedule.label: Lunch (Balanced Plate)
schedule.food: 1–2 Multigrain Rotis + Dal/Paneer/Sabzi (Haldi-Adrak-Lahsun tadka) + Protective Salad (patta gobhi + tamatar + kheera + gajar + nimbu). (Sulforaphane (गोभी वर्ग की सब्जियों का रक्षक तत्व) supports normal body repair pathways; use as food, not a cure.)

schedule.label: ✨ Enhanced Snack
schedule.food: 4-5 Soaked Almonds + 1 Akhrot OR Sprouted Moong OR roasted chana. + 1 small cup tea if needed. Because of pancreatitis and 8-10 cups tea habit, slowly reduce to 2-3 small cups/day, no sugar, and avoid tea with cigarettes.

schedule.label: Dinner (Gentle & Light)
schedule.food: 1 Multigrain Roti + Light Sabzi (Karela 1-2x/week in small portion, cooked with very little oil; Lauki/Tori/Tinda other days) OR Pancreas-Liver Support Soup. Take Panlipase with first bite if prescribed. Karela can lower sugar; monitor when used with insulin.

schedule.label: ✨ Golden Milk
schedule.food: Golden Milk = Haldi Doodh — ½ cup warm low-fat milk + ¼ tsp haldi + tiny pinch kali mirch + pinch dalchini. No sugar. Optional only; skip if it causes gas/acidity, loose stools, or nighttime urination.

recipes.title: 🟡 Haldi-Adrak Universal Tadka
recipes.details: Use this as the BASE for EVERY sabzi — ensures curcumin + piperine + gingerol + allicin enter every meal:
ingredients: Then add your vegetable (gobhi, karela, lauki, etc.)

recipes.title: 🥒 Protective Summer Salad
recipes.details: Serve with lunch daily if digestion allows — fiber, hydration, and protective plant compounds:
ingredients: Shredded Patta Gobhi (cabbage) — lightly steamed if raw causes gas; raw gives more sulforaphane (रक्षक तत्व)
Squeeze of Nimbu + Kala Namak + Kali Mirch
Few drops of Alsi oil (flaxseed) if available

recipes.title: 🫚 Pancreas Protection (अग्नाशय/Pancreas का बचाव) Soup
recipes.details: Plain meaning: a light dinner soup for pancreas + liver support. Use 2-3 evenings/week when digestion is heavy. It is food support, not a cure.
ingredients: ½ tsp Haldi + pinch Kali Mirch
No cream, no butter, no heavy tadka

recipes.title: 🥒 Simple Karela Sabzi
recipes.details: Use only 1-2 times/week because karela may lower sugar when insulin/Daparyl M are already being used.
ingredients: Slice karela thinly; remove hard seeds if present
Optional: rub with a little salt for 10 min, rinse lightly to reduce bitterness
Use 1 tsp mustard oil for the whole pan
Add jeera, onion/tomato if tolerated, adrak, haldi, dhania, and pinch kali mirch
Cook covered till soft; keep it dry/light
Avoid deep-fried karela, stuffed oily karela, and karela juice unless doctor approves

recipes.title: 🌾 Updated Multigrain Atta
recipes.details: Plain meaning: roti flour made slower-digesting than plain wheat. Portion still matters: usually 1 roti at dinner and 1-2 at lunch as per sugar readings.
ingredients: 400g Jau (Barley) — fiber-rich, blood sugar (ब्लड शुगर/रक्त शर्करा) regulation
100g Alsi (Flaxseed) powder — Omega-3 support; keep moderate because it is calorie dense
50g Methi Dana powder — supports sugar control; monitor if fasting sugar drops

protectiveDrinks.name: Haldi Kali Mirch Pani
protectiveDrinks.note: ¼–½ tsp haldi + pinch kali mirch + nimbu in warm water. Curcumin (हल्दी का सूजन कम करने वाला तत्व)

protectiveDrinks.name: Amla Juice / Water
protectiveDrinks.note: Fresh amla blended with water OR 1 tsp powder. Vitamin C + antioxidants (नुकसान से बचाने वाले तत्व)

protectiveDrinks.name: Giloy Water
protectiveDrinks.note: Skip unless doctor agrees. Can lower sugar when combined with insulin/Daparyl M.

protectiveDrinks.name: Haldi Doodh (Golden Milk)
protectiveDrinks.note: Warm low-fat milk + haldi + kali mirch + dalchini. Skip if gas/acidity/nocturia worsens.

protectiveDrinks.name: Tea Limit
protectiveDrinks.note: For pancreatitis, limit caffeine. Reduce from 8-10 cups slowly toward 2-3 small cups/day. No sugar, no biscuits, and never pair with cigarettes.

spiceProtocol.action: Anti-inflammatory (सूजन कम करने वाला), antioxidant (नुकसान से बचाने वाला)
spiceProtocol.usage: Every sabzi, dal, chilla. Always pair with Kali Mirch

spiceProtocol.action: Helps turmeric absorb better; use only a pinch if acidity occurs
spiceProtocol.usage: Freshly ground — dal, chaach, sabzi. 2-3 pinches daily

spiceProtocol.action: Anti-inflammatory (सूजन कम करने वाला), supports pancreatic enzyme flow
spiceProtocol.usage: Fresh grated in tea, chilla, sabzi. 1-inch daily

spiceProtocol.action: May support insulin sensitivity; use food-level amounts only
spiceProtocol.usage: ¼ tsp in chamomile tea. Ceylon preferred

spiceProtocol.action: Supports heart and immunity; can irritate acidity if taken raw
spiceProtocol.usage: 1 clove crushed in sabzi most days; raw only if tolerated

priorityPlan.items: Smoking quit setup: tell doctor, pick quit date, remove cigarettes/lighters, start 10-min post-meal walks + keep meals fixed
Add Amla + measured nuts + protective salad; discuss nicotine patch/gum or medicine support with doctor
Add Gobhi/Broccoli rotation. Keep total caffeine controlled: slowly reduce tea from 8-10 cups toward 2-3 small cups/day; avoid after 3 PM.
Do not add herbs such as Giloy/Kutki/Ashwagandha unless the treating doctor/Ayurvedic physician approves after LFTs and sugar pattern review

smokingCessationPlan.title: Set Quit Date (छोड़ने की तारीख)
smokingCessationPlan.note: Choose a date within 7-14 days. Tell family and doctor. Do not keep cigarettes at home, shop, or car.
smokingCessationPlan.hindi: तारीख पक्की करें और घर में कोई सिगरेट/लाइटर न रखें।

smokingCessationPlan.title: Doctor Support
smokingCessationPlan.note: Ask the doctor about nicotine patch/gum/lozenge or prescription medicines. Because he has diabetes, sugar should be checked more often during quitting.
smokingCessationPlan.hindi: निकोटीन पैच/गम मदद कर सकते हैं, पर शुगर की निगरानी जरूरी है।

smokingCessationPlan.title: Craving Rescue (तलब संभालना)
smokingCessationPlan.note: Use 4D: Delay 10 minutes, Deep breathing, Drink water, Do something else. Keep saunf, sugar-free gum, cucumber, roasted chana nearby.
smokingCessationPlan.hindi: तलब आए तो 10 मिनट रुकें, गहरी सांस लें, पानी पिएं, ध्यान बदलें।

smokingCessationPlan.title: Smoke-Free Tea Break
smokingCessationPlan.note: Replace cigarette breaks with 5-10 minute walks, chaach/jeera water, or unsweetened tea. Avoid pairing tea with cigarettes.
smokingCessationPlan.hindi: चाय के साथ सिगरेट की आदत तोड़नी है; चाय के बाद walk करें।

simpleAnswers.question: He cannot quit smoking. What can we do?
simpleAnswers.answer: Do not fight daily. Treat it like a medical addiction: doctor support, nicotine gum/patch/lozenge if doctor agrees, fixed quit date, no cigarettes stored at home, and replace tea-cigarette breaks with 5-10 min walk, saunf, cucumber, water, or sugar-free gum. Even cutting down is useful, but the goal remains zero tobacco.

simpleAnswers.question: 8-10 cups tea daily?
simpleAnswers.answer: Too much for pancreatitis, sleep, acidity, urination, and cigarette pairing. Reduce slowly: first 5-6 small cups, then 3-4, target 2-3 small cups/day. Keep tea without sugar, light milk, and no biscuits/namkeen.

simpleAnswers.question: What does 2x daily mean?
simpleAnswers.answer: 2x daily means two times in a day. For haldi + kali mirch, it does not need two separate drinks. Simpler rule: once as morning haldi water if tolerated, and once through normal cooking in dal/sabzi/chilla.

simpleAnswers.question: Jamun not available now
simpleAnswers.answer: No problem. Use one fruit portion: papaya small bowl, 1 small apple, 1 guava, or small bowl anar. Jamun is seasonal only; do not use jamun seed powder without doctor approval.

simpleAnswers.question: How to take karela sabzi?
simpleAnswers.answer: Take small portion 1-2 times/week, cooked like dry/light sabzi with 1 tsp oil for the whole pan, onion/tomato optional, haldi, jeera, adrak, and a pinch kali mirch. No deep fry, no stuffed oily karela, no karela juice while on insulin unless doctor approves.

simpleAnswers.question: What is Golden Milk?
simpleAnswers.answer: Golden Milk is just haldi doodh: 1/2 cup warm low-fat milk with 1/4 tsp haldi, tiny pinch kali mirch, and pinch dalchini. No sugar. It is optional, not compulsory.

simpleAnswers.question: Ashwagandha in which form?
simpleAnswers.answer: Do not start now by yourself. If the doctor/Ayurvedic doctor approves, use a standardized tablet/capsule from a reliable brand, usually at night after food. Avoid if thyroid disease/thyroid medicine, liver irritation, excessive sleepiness, or low sugar episodes.

simpleAnswers.question: What is Pancreas-Liver Support Soup?
simpleAnswers.answer: A light low-fat soup for dinner: lauki + gobhi + tomato + adrak + haldi + lahsun, boiled and blended. It is not a medicine; it is an easy-to-digest meal option for pancreatitis/fatty liver days.

simpleAnswers.question: What is Updated Atta?
simpleAnswers.answer: Updated Atta means a roti flour mix with more fiber and slower sugar rise: wheat + jowar + jau + ragi + little flaxseed + little methi + ajwain. Use it for measured rotis, not unlimited rotis.

safetyNotes.panlipase: ✅ Food-level safe; avoid high-dose curcumin/piperine capsules unless doctor approves
⚠️ Rare liver injury reports; use only if doctor approves

safetyNotes.insulin: ⚠️ Doctor review only — possible sugar effects
safetyNotes.panlipase: ⚠️ No routine use unless clinician approves

lifestyle.title: Post-Meal Walk
lifestyle.note: A gentle 10–15 min walk after meals helps steady sugar levels. Gradually build toward 150 min/week activity if doctor allows.

lifestyle.title: The Plate Rule
lifestyle.note: 50% Sabzi/Salad, 25% Protein, 25% Roti. Always take Panlipase with meals.

lifestyle.title: Medical Optimization
lifestyle.note: Regular check-ins with the doctor to ensure insulin and medications are perfectly balanced.

lifestyle.title: Consistent Monitoring
lifestyle.note: Track fasting levels and weight weekly to stay on target.

lifestyle.title: Daily Non-Negotiables
lifestyle.note: No cigarette, fixed meals, post-meal walk, measured roti/nuts, and daily sugar log.

lifestyle.title: Smoking Rule
lifestyle.note: Quitting will help sugar control, circulation, lungs, heart, and cancer-risk reduction more than any single food.

medications.name: Huminsulin
medications.purpose: Rapidly controls severe blood sugar (ब्लड शुगर/रक्त शर्करा) highs (glucose toxicity).

medications.name: Daparyl M (Dapagliflozin + Metformin)
medications.purpose: Improves insulin sensitivity and flushes excess glucose through kidneys. Hydration and hygiene are important.

medications.name: Panlipase 10000
medications.purpose: Pancreatic enzyme replacement (पाचन enzyme) for proper nutrient absorption. Take with first bite of meals.

snacks.name: Roasted Makhana
snacks.recipe: Dry-roast in ½ tsp ghee + kali mirch + haldi + chaat masala
snacks.benefit: Low-GI, high-fiber, rich in magnesium. Vata-pacifying, Kapha-neutral.

snacks.name: Pumpkin Seed + Almond Mix
snacks.recipe: 1 tbsp kaddu ke beej + 4-5 almonds + pinch kala namak
snacks.benefit: Zinc for prostate (प्रोस्टेट/गदूद). Omega-3 for liver. Bala-vardhak (strength-building).

snacks.name: Cucumber + Chana Chaat
snacks.recipe: Kheera slices + bhuna chana + nimbu + kala namak + chaat masala

snacks.name: Moong Sprouts Chaat
snacks.recipe: Sprouted moong + kheera + tamatar + nimbu + kala namak

snacks.name: Sattu Drink (Sugar-Free)
snacks.recipe: 2 tbsp sattu + nimbu + kala namak + jeera powder in cold water
snacks.benefit: Plant protein, fiber, cooling. Pitta-pacifying, energy-giving.

snacks.name: Paneer Tikka Bites
snacks.recipe: Low-fat paneer + haldi-adrak-lehsun dahi marinade, air-fried/grilled
snacks.benefit: Lean protein, no refined carbs. Bala-vardhak, Ojas-building.

snacks.name: Beetroot-Gajar Soup
snacks.recipe: Boil chukandar + gajar + adrak + haldi, blend smooth

snacks.name: Roasted Bhuna Chana
snacks.recipe: Plain roasted or with chaat masala + nimbu
snacks.benefit: High-protein, low-GI, liver-safe. Laghu, Ruksha — reduces Kapha.

liverProtocol.note: Optional 1 cup/day, counted inside total caffeine. May support lower liver fibrosis (लिवर का सख्त होना) risk; avoid late evening due to sleep/prostate.
Doctor/Ayurvedic physician review only. Can affect digestion and sugar; avoid self-starting.
Doctor/Ayurvedic physician only after LFTs. May lower sugar and can be risky with insulin/Daparyl M.
1 tbsp daily. Zinc for prostate (प्रोस्टेट/गदूद) health.
Optional 1 cup after lunch, counted inside total caffeine. Avoid after 3 PM if urination/sleep/acidity worsens.

liverHealingFoods.name: Black Coffee (no sugar)
liverHealingFoods.evidence: Regular coffee is associated with lower liver fibrosis (लिवर का सख्त होना) risk in liver-disease studies.
liverHealingFoods.how: Start 1 cup/day, morning or post-lunch; no sugar/cream

liverHealingFoods.name: Beetroot (Chukandar)
liverHealingFoods.evidence: Betalains (चुकंदर के रंग वाले antioxidant) support antioxidant intake.
liverHealingFoods.how: Grated in salad or as soup, 2–3x/week

liverHealingFoods.name: Pomegranate (Anar)
liverHealingFoods.evidence: Punicalagin (अनार का antioxidant) supports blood-vessel and liver-friendly eating.
liverHealingFoods.how: Small bowl 2-3x/week; count as fruit portion

liverHealingFoods.name: Green Tea
liverHealingFoods.evidence: EGCG catechins (ग्रीन टी antioxidants) may support heart/liver health.
liverHealingFoods.how: 1 cup after lunch; avoid late evening

pendingTests.reveals: Whether pancreas produces enough digestive enzymes (पाचन enzyme). If low, doctor may adjust Panlipase dose.
Whether fatty liver (फैटी लिवर/लिवर में चर्बी) has caused liver inflammation (सूजन) or cell stress — baseline before herbs.
Earliest sign of diabetic kidney stress (किडनी पर शुगर का असर) — USG can still look normal in early stages.

webCheckedSources.takeaway: Smoking makes diabetes harder to control; quitting can improve blood sugar management. Nicotine products can help but should be discussed with the doctor because nicotine can affect sugar.
Use regular balanced meals, plate method, fewer refined grains/added sugars, and whole foods. Whole fruit is safer than juice.
Gradual weight loss improves fatty liver. About 3-5% body-weight loss can reduce liver fat; 7-10% may be needed for inflammation/fibrosis. Rapid weight loss can worsen liver disease.
Low-fat small frequent meals, fluids, limiting caffeine, no alcohol, quitting smoking, and taking PERT with meals/snacks are core safety rules.
Limit evening fluids, caffeine, alcohol, spicy irritants if symptoms appear; vegetables, fruits, activity, and healthy weight support prostate symptoms.
Diabetes supplements have weak evidence and may interact with medicines. Ashwagandha and bioavailable turmeric/curcumin supplements have rare liver-injury reports; food-level spices are safer.
SGLT2 inhibitors can rarely cause ketoacidosis with symptoms like nausea, vomiting, abdominal pain, fatigue, or breathing difficulty, sometimes even when blood sugar is below 250 mg/dL.

eatables.reason: Dahi is good for daytime digestion (पाचन) (avoid at night). Hari Chutney (Mint/Coriander) is an excellent side for Chilla.
Extremely light on liver & pancreas, good for blood sugar (ब्लड शुगर/रक्त शर्करा).
Best protein. Easy to digest, doesn't tax the liver.
Cools the stomach, adds healthy gut bacteria for digestion (पाचन).
Pumpkin seeds provide zinc for prostate (प्रोस्टेट/गदूद) support. Walnuts provide healthy fats; keep quantity measured.
Choose only one small portion at a time. Jamun is good only when available in season; no fruit juice.
High fiber, keeps blood sugar (ब्लड शुगर/रक्त शर्करा) steady instead of spiking.
Daily food-level spices: curcumin (हल्दी), gingerol (अदरक), allicin (लहसुन) support inflammation control.
Useful only without sugar and in small amounts. Because of pancreatitis, reduce 8-10 cups tea toward 2-3 small cups/day.

avoidables.reason: Nicotine (तंबाकू का नशे वाला रसायन) raises sugar and multiplies heart, lung, liver, and cancer risk.
Processed, fried, and spikes blood sugar (ब्लड शुगर/रक्त शर्करा) rapidly while burdening digestion (पाचन).
Immediately turns into liver fat and spikes diabetes.
Acts like glue in the stomach, spikes sugar instantly.
Taxes the pancreas and directly increases fatty liver (फैटी लिवर/लिवर में सूजन).
Hidden sugars rapidly raise sugar and add liver fat.
Too much oil and salt. Increases blood pressure and acidity.
Pancreas cannot digest heavy fats properly right now.

precautions.title: Portion Control (मात्रा पर नियंत्रण/कम खाना)
rules: Avoid overeating; stop when 80% full.
Eat smaller, frequent meals rather than large, heavy ones.
Do not skip meals, especially if taking insulin or sugar-lowering medicines.
Keep nuts, roti, fruit, and paneer measured; healthy foods can still increase weight if portions are large.

precautions.title: Cooking Oils & Fats
rules: Use cold-pressed mustard oil (sarson) or olive oil.
Limit total oil intake to 3 teaspoons (15ml) per day.
Avoid repeatedly heated oil, vanaspati, and deep-fried foods. Do not add extra ghee/butter.

precautions.title: Meal Timings
rules: Finish dinner by 7:30 PM to 8:00 PM.
Keep a natural overnight gap only if meals are regular and the doctor agrees. Do not intentionally fast, skip meals, or sharply cut carbs while taking insulin/Daparyl M.
Take a gentle post-meal walk (10-15 mins) to prevent sugar spikes.
Do not do long fasting or crash dieting while on insulin unless doctor specifically advises it.

precautions.title: Hydration (पानी की कमी पूरी करना) & Sleep
rules: Keep steady hydration through the day; the doctor may adjust fluid goals if heart, kidney, swelling, or nighttime urination issues appear.
Avoid heavy fluid intake 2 hours before bed to prevent nocturia (nighttime urination) due to prostate (प्रोस्टेट/गदूद) enlargement.
Avoid drinking large amounts of water immediately after meals; sip warm water or chaach instead.
Keep coffee/green tea before 3 PM if sleep or nighttime urination worsens.
Reduce 8-10 cups tea slowly; target 2-3 small cups/day because pancreatitis guidance recommends limiting caffeine.

precautions.title: Daparyl M Hygiene
rules: Daparyl M pushes sugar into urine. Combined with mild prostate (प्रोस्टेट/गदूद) enlargement, this creates a high risk for UTIs and fungal infections.
Maintain strict personal hygiene after urination to prevent bacterial growth.

precautions.title: Smoking Quit Safety (धूम्रपान छोड़ने की सावधानी)
rules: Do not replace cigarettes with sweets, biscuits, or extra tea snacks.
Check fasting and post-meal sugar more often during the first 2-4 weeks of quitting.
Ask the doctor about nicotine replacement or quitting medicines; quitting support is safer than continuing chain smoking.

eatable.name: Jamun (Black Plum) — seasonal only
eatable.reason: Use 8-10 pieces only when available. Do not use jamun seed powder without doctor approval.

eatable.name: Papaya (Papeeta)
eatable.reason: Rich in papain enzyme, great for digestion (पाचन) and pancreas.

eatable.name: Apple (Seb)
eatable.reason: High in pectin fiber, keeps blood sugar (ब्लड शुगर/रक्त शर्करा) steady.

eatable.name: Guava (Amrood)
eatable.reason: Low glycemic index (शुगर धीरे बढ़ाने वाला), rich in vitamin C and fiber.

eatable.name: Pomegranate (Anar)
eatable.reason: Potent antioxidants (एंटीऑक्सीडेंट्स/नुकसान से बचाने वाले तत्व) that protect the liver.

eatable.name: Mosambi / Orange
eatable.reason: One small whole fruit is okay if sugar readings allow. Avoid juice.

eatable.name: Pear (Nashpati)
eatable.reason: Fiber-rich and usually gentler on sugar than very sweet fruits; use small portion.

nonEatable.name: Mango (Aam)
nonEatable.reason: High in simple sugars; avoid until sugar is controlled. Later only doctor/dietitian-approved small portions.

nonEatable.name: Banana (Kela)
nonEatable.reason: High glycemic index when ripe, can cause sugar spikes.

nonEatable.name: Grapes (Angoor)
nonEatable.reason: Very high in fructose, quickly turns into liver fat.

nonEatable.name: Watermelon (Tarbooz)
nonEatable.reason: Can raise sugar quickly if portion is large; avoid while fasting sugar is high.

nonEatable.name: Lychee & Chikoo
nonEatable.reason: Very sweet, avoid completely to protect liver and manage diabetes.

dalsAndLegumes.name: Yellow Moong Dal
dalsAndLegumes.benefit: Lightest to digest, high protein, safe for pancreas and liver.

dalsAndLegumes.name: Red Masoor Dal
dalsAndLegumes.benefit: Rich in fiber and protein, helps stabilize blood sugar (ब्लड शुगर/रक्त शर्करा).

dalsAndLegumes.name: Chana Dal (Bengal Gram)
dalsAndLegumes.benefit: Lowest Glycemic Index (शुगर बढ़ाने की गति) among dals, excellent for diabetes.
dalsAndLegumes.bestFor: Twice a week, keeps you full longer

dalsAndLegumes.name: Sprouted Moong
dalsAndLegumes.benefit: Live enzymes boost digestion (पाचन), high in antioxidants (एंटीऑक्सीडेंट्स/नुकसान से बचाने वाले तत्व).

dalsAndLegumes.name: Arhar/Toor Dal
dalsAndLegumes.benefit: Common dal, acceptable if cooked thin with less oil and hing/jeera for gas.

dalsAndLegumes.name: Urad/Rajma/Chole
dalsAndLegumes.benefit: Heavier and gas-forming; not forbidden, but use rarely, small portions, soaked well, and only when digestion is stable.

grainGuide.name: Updated Multigrain Atta
grainGuide.benefit: Best routine roti option because wheat is mixed with jowar, jau, ragi, little flaxseed, methi, and ajwain.
grainGuide.how: Use measured rotis: 1-2 at lunch, 1 at dinner depending on sugar.

grainGuide.name: Jau (Barley)
grainGuide.benefit: High fiber and slower sugar rise; good for diabetes/fatty liver.
grainGuide.how: Use in atta mix, not as unlimited porridge.

grainGuide.name: Jowar
grainGuide.benefit: Useful summer grain and gluten-free; still a carbohydrate.
grainGuide.how: Use in mixed atta or one jowar roti occasionally.

grainGuide.name: Ragi
grainGuide.benefit: Mineral-rich but can raise sugar if portion is large.
grainGuide.how: Small amount in atta mix; avoid sweet ragi drinks.

grainGuide.name: Oats / Daliya
grainGuide.benefit: Fiber-rich breakfast option if chilla is not possible.
grainGuide.how: Plain salted vegetable oats/daliya; no sugar/honey.

grainGuide.name: Rice / Poha / Suji
grainGuide.benefit: Faster sugar rise; keep limited while fasting sugar is high.
grainGuide.how: Small occasional portions only, paired with dal and sabzi.

grainGuide.name: Bajra
grainGuide.benefit: Nutritious but heavier/heating for summer and digestion.
grainGuide.how: Use rarely in hot weather or if gas/acidity increases.

items.name: Spinach (Palak)
items.reason: Useful leafy green in rotation; cook lightly and keep oil low.

items.name: Fenugreek (Methi)
items.reason: Lowers blood sugar (ब्लड शुगर/रक्त शर्करा) levels naturally.

items.name: Mustard Greens (Sarson)
items.reason: Powerful antioxidants (एंटीऑक्सीडेंट्स/नुकसान से बचाने वाले तत्व) for cell repair.

items.name: Bathua / Chaulai
items.reason: Good leafy options in rotation; cook well and keep oil low.

items.name: Broccoli
items.reason: Contains sulforaphane (गोभी वर्ग का रक्षक तत्व); useful as part of a vegetable-rich diet.

items.name: Cauliflower (Gobhi)
items.reason: Anti-inflammatory (सूजन कम करने वाला) and fiber-rich.

items.name: Cabbage (Patta Gobhi)
items.reason: Good in salad; lightly steam if raw causes gas.

items.name: Lauki (Bottle Gourd)
items.reason: Easiest on the digestive system, cooling.

items.name: Karela (Bitter Gourd)
items.reason: May lower sugar; use small portions and monitor with insulin.

items.name: Tinda (Apple Gourd)
items.reason: Hydrating and very light on the liver.

items.name: Pumpkin (Kaddu)
items.reason: Allowed in small portions; cook without sugar/jaggery.

items.name: Bhindi (Okra)
items.reason: Fiber-rich and usually diabetes-friendly; cook with little oil.

items.name: Baingan / Capsicum / Beans
items.reason: Good rotation vegetables when cooked lightly and not fried.

items.name: Potato, Arbi, Jimikand
items.reason: Starchy; raises sugar faster. Use rarely and in small portions.

items.name: Very oily stuffed sabzi
items.reason: Too much fat can worsen pancreatitis and fatty liver.

items.name: Garlic (Lahsun)
items.reason: Sulfur compounds and allicin (लहसुन का रक्षक तत्व) support heart-friendly cooking.

items.name: Onion (Pyaz)
items.reason: Quercetin reduces inflammation in the prostate (प्रोस्टेट/गदूद).

glossary.meaning: सूजन और oxidative stress (अंदरूनी नुकसान) कम करने में मदद करने वाला plant compound.
लहसुन crush करने पर बनता है; heart-friendly cooking और immunity support में मददगार.

glossary.hindi: काली मिर्च का अवशोषण बढ़ाने वाला तत्व
glossary.meaning: हल्दी के curcumin को शरीर में absorb करने में मदद करता है; acidity हो तो बहुत कम लें.

glossary.hindi: गोभी वर्ग की सब्जियों का रक्षक तत्व
glossary.meaning: Cabbage, cauliflower, broccoli में मिलता है; शरीर के normal repair systems को support करता है.
Smoking, high sugar, pollution और stress से cells को नुकसान होना.

glossary.hindi: इंसुलिन का ठीक से काम न करना
glossary.meaning: Body में insulin मौजूद है, पर cells sugar को ठीक से अंदर नहीं ले पाते.

glossary.hindi: लिवर में मध्यम स्तर की चर्बी
glossary.meaning: लिवर में fat जमा है; sugar control, weight loss, walking, and zero alcohol से अक्सर सुधर सकता है.
Diabetes से kidney पर शुरुआती असर पता करने का test.
For haldi+kali mirch, this can mean once as drink and once inside normal cooking. It does not mean forcing two extra drinks.
Warm low-fat milk with haldi, tiny kali mirch, and dalchini. No sugar. Optional only.
Low-fat boiled/blended soup for easy digestion on dinner days; not a medicine.
Wheat mixed with jowar, jau, ragi, little flaxseed, methi, and ajwain so roti raises sugar more slowly than plain wheat.
